bullets: Chinese Christians under renewed police investigation for distributing Scripture and religious materials, facing potential charges despite prior insufficient evidence findings.
Kenyan Christian laborers and their families living under threat of religiously motivated ambushes, violence, and displacement by militant groups.
Nigerian Christian communities in central Nigeria grieving more than 20 killed in an overnight militant attack, with survivors facing ongoing insecurity and inadequate protection.
Millions of civilians across Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes, displacement, and the deaths of children, families, aid workers, and conservationists amid worsening humanitarian conditions
Thousands of civilians in Iran and Lebanon killed or wounded in ongoing strikes, with restricted communications and limited independent access making the full scale of suffering difficult to document
Civilians across Ukraine enduring repeated overnight drone and missile strikes killing children and families, with fuel shortages in occupied Crimea adding to widespread hardship

Hundreds of thousands of civilians in Sudan's Kordofan, White Nile, and Blue Nile regions caught in drone strikes, armed attacks, and an expanding conflict that continues to kill and displace communities

Communities across Nigeria in multiple states facing kidnappings, armed bandit raids, Boko Haram attacks killing farmers and a newborn, and students held captive with families waiting for their return
Civilians across Myanmar enduring military airstrikes killing hundreds including children, with mourners struck by a second airstrike while burying victims of the first
Residents near Niamey facing the aftermath of a deadly armed attack on the capital's airport that killed thirteen people and signals violence reaching previously secure areas
Civilians in Somalia's Hiiraan and Baidoa regions caught between clan fighting, armed group attacks, and ongoing military operations
Families and communities in the Philippines grieving after a classroom shooting killed three students and a separate family massacre claimed the lives of a toddler and elderly woman
Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo surpassing one thousand confirmed cases among displaced civilians crowded into camps with no approved vaccine and limited contact tracing
Soldiers and border communities in Kenya facing continued armed group attacks near the Somali border
Bolivian communities beginning to recover after five weeks of road blockades cut off access to food, fuel, and medicine amid a state of emergency
Millions of young people in India affected by exam paper leaks, score irregularities, and a student mental health crisis, with protesters demanding government accountability
Residents of a Montreal neighborhood shaken by a deadly ambush on police officers tied to extremist ideology
Families across Haiti living under the ongoing threat of gang violence and kidnapping
Opposition supporters and detained legal advocates in Uganda facing restricted access to legal representation
Families and communities in Indonesia grieving three people killed by a volcanic eruption and facing ongoing risk from one of the country's most active volcanoes.
Tourists and residents near an active volcano in Guatemala who fled for their lives during a sudden eruption, facing continued danger from one of Central America's most frequently active peaks.
Communities across Madagascar mourning at least 20 people killed and dozens injured by a cyclone, with families already exhausted from repeated storms this season.

Residents across multiple United States states displaced by wildfires, tornadoes, and flooding, including evacuees in Alaska threatened by a wildfire near homes and a school, and families uprooted by storms and rising waters in Indiana, Texas, Kentucky, and Louisiana.
More than 1,300 people displaced in Ghana by severe flooding worsened by years of illegal mining that has degraded riverbanks and stripped the land's ability to absorb rainfall.

Nearly three million children and adolescents at risk in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo amid a worsening Ebola outbreak with over 1,000 confirmed cases, 254 deaths, no approved vaccine, and health workers struggling to reach affected and confined populations.
Pilgrims, residents, and displaced families across India affected by monsoon-season landslides that have killed and trapped people, destroyed homes, and left communities at risk of further collapse.
Families in Nepal displaced and made homeless by multiple landslides across hilly districts during monsoon rains, with homes destroyed and additional properties at risk of collapse.
Residents near rivers in Russia facing dangerous flood levels threatening homes, farmland, and properties as waters rise toward critical thresholds in multiple regions.
Residents in a Montreal neighbourhood displaced after flash flooding struck with little warning, forcing evacuations and damaging homes.
Rare orangutan population in Indonesia severely diminished after a cyclone killed dozens of the animals and destroyed a significant portion of their already fragile forest habitat.
